blocks.content: I walked home the long way. Not on purpose. Just — the shorter way felt like it would get me home too fast.
It was half a second. I'd been running routes for two weeks where half a second is everything. I knew what half a second felt like. That wasn't nothing.

options.label: You kept thinking about the exact half-second. Which hand. What it felt like.
You kept thinking about what you should have said after.
You kept thinking about next Thursday. Counting the days.
You tried not to think about it. Failed.
